web.regions.data_sovereignty_title.text: Mana Raraunga me te Noho Motuhake ā-Rohe

web.regions.data_sovereignty_description.text: Ka noho ōu raraunga i tō rohe kōwhiria anake, kāore e nekehia ana ki waenga rohe

web.regions.separate_environments_explan.text: Ka mahi ia rohe hei taiao motuhake katoa me ōna ake pūnaha, ngā kī muhumuhu, me te rokiroki raraunga

web.regions.no_data_transfer_policy.text: He kaupeka ū tō mātou: kāore ngā raraunga kiritaki e nekehia ana i waenga rohe i raro i ōhea āhuatanga

web.regions.switching_creates_new_accoun.text: Hira: Mā te huri ki tētahi rohe rerekē ka waihanga pūkete hōu. Ka noho tōu raraunga ki tō rohe taketake.

web.regions.why_it_matters.text: He Aha te Tikanga o te Mana Raraunga

web.regions.trust_description.text: Mōhio ōu wāhi e noho ana ōu raraunga me ngā ture e tiaki ana i ērā.

web.regions.privacy_description.text: Whakaūtia ka whakahaerehia ōu mōhiohio tūmataiti e ai ki ngā ture matatapu o tō motu me ngā āpure, hei ārai i te urunga kāore i whakaaetia, te hara rānei.

web.regions.compliance_description.text: Tutukia ngā hiahia GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA, me ērā atu tiaki raraunga ā-rohe

web.regions.performance_description.text: Ko ngā raraunga e noho ana i tōu taha ka heke iho ai te hauroa, ka pai ake ai te mahi.

web.regions.contact_our_compliance_team.text: whakapā ki tō mātou rōpū whai ture

web.regions.your_account_and_data_are_pr.text: Ka tiakina tō pūkete me ō raraunga i raro i ngā ture me ngā whakaritenga o

web.regions.this_regulatory_framework_is.text: Ka whakaritea tēnei anga whakahaere e tō rohe uru:

web.regions.each_jurisdiction_maintains_.text: Ka pupuri ia mana whakahaere i ngā tūtohutanga ture motuhake me te mana whakahaere raraunga. Ahakoa ka taea e koe te waihanga pūkete i ngā mana whakahaere maha, ka noho ture motuhake tonu me te kore tuari raraunga i waenga i ngā rohe whakahaere.

web.regions.to_understand_the_specific_r.text: Ki te mārama ki ngā ture motuhake me ngā whakamarumaru e hāngai ana ki tō pūkete, tēnā

web.regions.unknown_jurisdiction.text: Rohe-ture e Kore Ana i Mōhiotia

web.regions.serving_you_from_the.text: E mahi ana māu mai i

web.regions.changing_regions_title.text: E Huri Ana i Ngā Rohe

web.regions.changing_regions_description.text: Ko tō mātou kaupeka he kore rawa atu e neke raraunga i waenga rohe. Ka mahi ia rohe hei taiao motuhake katoa.

web.regions.changing_regions_how_to.text: Hei whakamahi i tētahi rohe rerekē, waihangahia he pūkete hōu ki reira mā te wāhitau īmēra ōrite ki tō wāhitau whakapā nama.

web.regions.changing_regions_billing_not.text: Ki te rerekē tō wāhitau whakapā nama i tō wāhitau pūkete Onetime Secret, whakamahia te wāhitau whakapā nama mō te pūkete rohe hōu hei tiaki i ōu hua ohaurunga.

web.regions.changing_regions_subscriptio.text: Ka taea e ngā hua ohaurunga te āpply aunoa ki tētahi pūkete i waihangahia mā tō wāhitau īmēra nama.

web.regions.no_region_configured.text: Kāore he mōhiohio rohe e waatea ana mō tō pūkete i tēnei wā.
